item.title: Don't Nazi at University of Washington. The students don't seem to be as antisemitic as Trump thinks. #ClassWarfare
item.description: Someone shared this without audio. Here's the context from the OP on Reddit. Context: this piece of filth barged into Psych 210 (The Diversity of Human Sexuality) throwing up nazi salutes, yelling Heil Hitler, and calling everyone “retarded degenerates” (edit: and “fags”). Class didn’t appreciate it. https://www.reddit.com/r/udub/s/dJg5HnQ2Hf UPDATE: Nazi loser posts his POV, but it cuts out before he starts running and crying. Professor is a badass! https://imgur.com/gallery/lzaIQTu
item.dc:creator: KitchenComandante

item.title: This place needs more Peacocks

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1482 (capes)
item.description:
Let's steal this bread, comrades.
Nightmares and pain last night. And today
Black-throated Sparrow coming in for a landing on a Cholla cactus (not my photo)
I had a dream my hands froze up with arthritis and I was at a restaurant that served a tea developed by Aristotle for curing it. It didn't work.
Had another dream where I was stuck moving with my parents to a shitty house in South Dakota and I was simultaneously my age now and a teenager and the house was owned by a family friend, and it was absolute shit with a storm shelter that could barely fit the three of us, and there was a day with three tornadoes and we kept having to go in and out of the damn thing as the fuckers kept teasing us by dissapating as they entered the property or turned away at the last minute. In addition, I broke down in tears about missing home at a restaurant/antique shop that inexplicably had an exhibit about Jerome, a small town where I lived for a while. I just cried, and clung to the exhibit like I was five. I remember in the dream uttering the line that I wanted to burn all the historical papers in the exhibit and snort them like cocaine to get the molecules of the one place I lived where things were mostly okay, into my body
Suffice to say we are not doing good this morning, folks.
I'd play the hell out of this, even though this is an AI creation. It would be a nice successor to Titanic: Adventure out of Time.
Oh, we have a migraine, upset stomach, and rigid hands today. Maybe I am getting actual arthritis in my hands, but at 41, that's gotta be unusual. Too bad I live in America and will never know, lmao!
This has big @SecretHarpy Energy. And big me energy.
This works better than the original "truism"
I would wear the shit out of this at a wedding. Hell, id wear the shit out of this in daily life if I could get away with it.
Mood. This image is just a whole mood.
I mean, if i actually broke through my anxiety and asked her and she said yes and was down for it.
I would rejoice if I died, frankly. I'm tired of life so much, tbh. But still, I trundle along at the end of Empire, for the sake of memes so others don't feel as wretched as I do, and for The Pippin.
I see the people with pet pigeons, and I'm kinda jealous.
If I had an infinite budget I would have so many fountain pens....
I wish I had thought to put drug lord elves in my current DnD campaign, but there isn't really a place for them, either.
I am debating going back to bed after posting this.
Yeah, that tracks.
Its a good motto for life, if only I followed it
Honestly, do not see an issue.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Hello good morning!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: GovBrief Today #244
item.description: The shutdown is a weapon for Trump. Two days after a judge threatened officials with contempt for defying his Voice of America restoration order, the agency shut down all broadcasts and furloughed every journalist. Universities face funding deals requiring ideological screening of foreign students and sharing discipline records with immigration authorities. Trump dismissed 22 of 26 National Council on the Humanities members one month after a judge ruled his grant terminations unlawful. Officials promise more mass firings this week. Document what you see. Share one story completely. The chaos is strategic, and your attention and sharing breaks through it. However you resist, don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/us-qatar-defense-agreement [2] https://go.govbrief.today/nj-college-food-aid [3] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-college-funding-preferences [4] https://go.govbrief.today/voa-stops-broadcasting-again [5] https://go.govbrief.today/cook-scotus-fed-remaining [6] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-task-force-memphis [7] https://go.govbrief.today/hesgseth-nda-polygraph-crackdown [8] https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-motion-rejected [9] https://go.govbrief.today/dc-police-immigration-trump [10] https://go.govbrief.today/immigrants-bond-release-ruling [11] https://go.govbrief.today/special-ed-budget-nj [12] https://go.govbrief.today/grijalva-delayed-again-congress [13] https://go.govbrief.today/humanities-council-mostly-fired [14] https://go.govbrief.today/fired-stb-member-sues [15] https://go.govbrief.today/gateway-hudson-project-frozen [16] https://go.govbrief.today/admin-sued-ai-use [17] https://go.govbrief.today/fonda-committee-first-amendment Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Plastic to fuel. This sounds amazing
item.description: https://www.earth.com/news/scientists-manage-to-convert-toxic-plastics-into-fuel-with-95-percent-efficiency/ Peer reviewed and everything. There are some potential application concerns discussed in the article, but I hope this takes off.
item.dc:creator: TranquilPotato

item.title: selling out in Riyadh
item.description:
Marc Maron
Gianmarco Soresi
No surprise that the Rogansphere Bros and Kevin Hart have no integrity.
Jim Jefferies wanted to go, but disappeared from the Riyadh festival lineup after he said on Theo Von’s podcast: ‘One reporter was killed by the [Saudi] government – unfortunate, but not a fucking hill that I’m gonna die on.’
Usually, you say that a guilty conscience is a bad pillow. I think Bill Burr found a way around it. I am disgusted, and deeply disappointed.
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: A Nazi got Chased Out of A Class at University of Washington
item.description:
Guy did a Nazi salute, said heil Hitler and called the class retards. Scroll to bottom for link to clip with sound.
A person (blue shirt guy) came into a Psychology Class on the University of Washington campus in Seattle, WA and shouted "Heil Hitler," gave the Nazi salute and called the class "retarded." The class responded by chasing him out of the building, through campus, pepper spraying, and essentially doing a citizens arrest. Sorry for not being able to pull the audio, here's a link to the source: https://www.reddit.com/r/udub/comments/1nvrdnd/nazi_interrupts_psych_210_receives_predictable/ This is how we should be responding to Nazis.
item.dc:creator: VoidForScreaming

item.title: Purpose
item.description: Ever fallen in love for a show or comic, only to discover it got canceled because not enough people supported it? We don't want that to happen here. The brutal truth is: creating these comics is a labor of love, but love alone doesn't pay the bills. Without financial support, even things you cherish can fade away. By joining our Patreon, you're not just getting perks – you're keeping this comic alive. If you love what we do, help ensure it doesn't disappear. Your support means everything. https://www.patreon.com/c/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial
